message:
web: Add WebSearch and Glob tool rendering with external link support

- Add custom WebSearch rendering with markdown summary and numbered links list
- Add Glob tool rendering with file count and file list
- Add LinkRenderer to markdown for external links (target=_blank, rel=noopener)
- Change Glob icon from Folder to Asterisk

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/m5qdwxqazt26az7grpf7fcxk
